name: omnes-crm
description: Sistema de Gestión Comercial OMNES Holding

scripts.postinstall: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.start:exe: npm run build && cd server && npx pkg dist/index.js --config ../package.json --target node22-win-x64 --output ../dist/omnes-crm.exe
scripts.db:push: cd server && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
